title: Codon
summary: A 3-nucleotide sequence on molecules/mrna that specifies one amino acid (or a stop signal). There are 4³ = 64 possible codons, of which 61 specify amino acids (with redundancy — most amino acids have multiple codons, see concepts/codon-redundancy) and 3 are stop codons (UAA, UAG, UGA). The start codon AUG also codes for molecules/methionine.
